title: Stop disabling grab navigation during gaze capture
summary: 0.4.23 removes the extra grab-navigation disable from the current CUA gaze-focus capture path while leaving the rest of the player input capture behavior unchanged.
reasoning: The current runtime is not consuming the joystick press that originally justified grabbing and navigation suppression, so carrying that disable forward adds friction without helping the focused player controls.

changes.summary: Stops toggling VaM's grab-navigation disable while the player owns focused gaze capture.
changes.reasoning: This keeps the capture seam narrower and removes an unnecessary side effect from the input module.

verification: Stamp version 0.4.23 into player.version.json and BuildRuntimeInfo.cs, then build the player release in package-only mode.
Verify the packaged artifact is named FrameAngel.Player.0.4.23.var and contains the 0.4.23 asset, plugin, preset, and demo scene.
Verify the CUA player plugin compiles after the input-capture toggle change.
knownIssues: This does not yet change any joystick-trigger modifier logic or future radial-input work.
Live VaM proof is still needed to judge the exact feel of grab navigation alongside gaze focus.
